devdoc.title: ConfidentialVotesResolution - outcome-only voting for a confidential votes token

InvalidKMSSignatures().notice: Returned if the returned KMS signatures are not valid.

SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

PublicDecryptionVerified(bytes32[],bytes.notice: This event is emitted when public decryption has been successfully verified.

canPropose(address).notice: True when `account` has activated self-delegated voting power.

castVote(uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Adds an encrypted for/against vote weighted by the caller's snapshot units.

propose(string,uint48).notice: Opens a resolution whose voting power snapshots at the current token clock.

requestTally(uint256).notice: After voting, requests public decryption of only the pass/fail result when quorum was reached. A non-quorate resolution resolves false without decrypting any tally.

settle(uint256,bool,bytes).notice: Verifies and stores the publicly decrypted outcome. Anyone may relay the proof.

userdoc.notice: A narrow, token-agnostic form of CharterResolutionsV3 for checkpointed confidential voting units. Proposal text, proposer, voters, timing, voter count, quorum status, and the final pass/fail result are public. Vote direction, individual weight, and aggregate totals remain encrypted; only the pass/fail handle is made publicly decryptable.
